Compliance.description: Claims full PSIRA compliance, SASA Gold, ISO certified, SAIDSA, SASSETA, Level 1 B-BBEE, no violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.6/5 (1 recent 1-star: no armed response); Indeed employees 4/5 (92 reviews). Limited customer data.

Product Value.description: Wide range incl armed reaction, monitoring, facilities mgmt. Value unclear sans pricing.

Innovation.description: AI cameras, IoT, thermal/facial rec, CiiMS, Guard Tower solar CCTV. No app.

Customer Support.description: Command centre; complaint of delayed response. Employee reviews note client comms. Phone/email support.

Accessibility & Security.description: Nationwide coverage, website accessible, POPIA compliant policy with data subject forms. Digital dashboards. No app limits some access.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Not publicly listed; industry avg R700/mo armed response ZAR

socialSentiment.summary: Sparse reviews; positive on LinkedIn, Indeed employees positive (4/5); HelloPeter critical.
